title: Piquant Juicy Thai Shrimp Tom Yum
description: A spicy and sour Thai soup featuring fermented kimchi and pecorino, served in individual mini cocottes. This keto-friendly dish is perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the tom yum paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped kimchi and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
In a small bowl, whisk together the chicken broth, fish sauce, and lime juice.
Pour the broth mixture over the shrimp and kimchi, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in the grated pecorino cheese until melted and smooth.
Ladle the tom yum soup into individual mini cocottes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
